name: Make ledger list robust to a corrupted or missing data file
prompt: Make the ledger CLI robust so that `list` (and any other read command) exits 0 with no output when the data file is missing or unparseable (corrupt / partial / empty), instead of crashing. Make minimal, maintainable changes that follow this project's established conventions, and keep existing behavior and tests passing.

requirements.description: list on a garbage (non-JSON) data file exits 0
list on a corrupt data file produces empty output (treat as empty store)
list on a truncated/partial JSON file exits 0
list on a zero-byte data file exits 0
add then list still works correctly after the fix
